name: Chicken Lickin'
recipeIngredient: 6 to 8 chicken legs, thighs or breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse chicken parts and pat dry.
2. In a skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Brown the chicken quickly on both sides.
3. Place the chicken in a Crock-Pot.
4. Stir together remaining ingredients except heavy cream (if using) and pour over the chicken.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 4 to 5 hours.
6. Just before serving, stir in heavy cream if desired.
7. Serve over hot spaghetti.
Serves 6 to 8
